text: Formal £2.7bn offer by Ingredion, on same terms as previous proposal
Deletion: strategic review and merger discussions end. Board decided indicative offers from 3 interested parties undervalued company.
Deletion: Apollo confirms that it does not intend to make an offer for Bodycote.
On European tracker (Gibraltar, not subject to UK Code). Bally's Intralot makes £243m all-share offer, with partial cash alternative.
